sql_array: CREATE TABLE sizes (id UInt64, readable_size String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO sizes VALUES (1, '1 B'), (2, '2 KiB'), (3, '3 MB'), (4, 'invalid');
SELECT id, readable_size, parseReadableSizeOrNull(readable_size) AS size_in_bytes FROM sizes;
UPDATE sizes SET readable_size = '5.5 MiB' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, parseReadableSizeOrNull(readable_size) AS size_in_bytes FROM sizes WHERE size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL;
